questionHtml: Give an upper bound for the travelling salesman problem for the graph above.
markschemeHtml:
ABCDE is an Hamiltonian cycle    A1

Thus an upper bound is given by 7 + 9 + 9 + 8 + 6 = 39    A1

[2 marks]
